message:
feat(routing,dep): route-aware dep add/remove with auto-flush and cross-project guard

Extend the routed-storage pattern to fully support `dep add` and `dep
remove` for external issues, and strengthen cross-project dependency
safety.

**dep routing (dep.rs)**
- Refactor monolithic `execute` into per-subcommand helpers
  (`execute_dep_add`, `execute_dep_remove`, `execute_dep_list`,
  `execute_dep_tree`) so each subcommand resolves its own route
  independently, matching the pattern already used by `comments`.
- `open_routed_storage_for_input` now returns a third `bool`
  (`auto_flush_external`) that is `true` when the resolved route targets
  an external workspace.
- After mutations (dep add / dep remove), call `auto_flush_if_enabled()`
  when `auto_flush_external` is set so JSONL is kept in sync with the
  external workspace, mirroring what comments-add already does.
- `set_last_touched_id` is now called on the *invoking* workspace's
  `beads_dir` (not the routed one) so that `br update` follow-ups
  resolve correctly.
- Extract `parse_dependency_type` helper shared by `dep_add` and the
  existing `normalize_dep_type_filter`.
- Add `validate_dependency_target_route`: rejects `dep add` when the
  issue and its dependency target resolve to *different* projects without
  an explicit `external:` prefix, surfacing a clear error message.

**comments routing (comments.rs)**
- `open_routed_storage_for_input` updated to return the same 3-tuple
  `(storage_ctx, route_cli, auto_flush_external)`; callers that don't
  need the flag use `_`.

**test coverage (e2e_routing.rs)**
- `e2e_routing_dep_add_remove_and_list_external_issue_via_main_workspace`:
  full round-trip — dep add via routed ID, dep list, JSONL persistence
  assertion, dep remove, list-after-remove, JSONL cleanup assertion.
- `e2e_routing_dep_add_sets_invoking_workspace_last_touched_for_follow_up_update`:
  verifies that `dep add` on an external issue sets last-touched in the
  invoking workspace so a bare `br update` targets the right issue.
- `e2e_routing_dep_add_rejects_direct_cross_project_target`: verifies the
  new cross-project guard errors with actionable message mentioning
  `external:`.
- Extended existing comment routing test to assert JSONL auto-flush on
  the external workspace after `comments add`.
- Use `last_touched_path()` helper instead of hardcoded path construction
  in two existing tests.

**test fixes**
- `conformance_schema.rs`: use `assert_cmd::cargo::cargo_bin!` macro for
  `br` binary discovery instead of manual `CARGO_TARGET_DIR` env var
  construction.
- `e2e_errors.rs`: suppress unused-variable warning on parsed id.
- `e2e_global_flags.rs`: update JSON list assertion to expect object
  envelope `{issues: [...]}` instead of bare array; fix `stale` invocation
  to use `--days` flag.
- `workspace_failure_replay.rs`: navigate `issues` envelope key in
  `first_issue_id`; update invalid-JSON error string to `"invalid issue
  record"`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
